Title: complete_table_name
Description: Returns a fully qualified table name.

The complete_table_name() can be used to make a
    fully qualified table name from non-qualified one, i.e. the qualifier and
    owner will be added if they are missing.
Examples:
SQL> use WS;
Done. -- 4 msec.
SQL> select complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES', 1);
callret
VARCHAR
WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES
1 Rows. -- 1 msec.
SQL> select complete_table_name('SYS_DAV_RES__', 1);
callret
VARCHAR
WS.DBA.SYS_DAV_RES__
1 Rows. -- 1 msec.
